hero.headline: Verify Companies. Analyze Risk. Trade with Confidence.
hero.subheadline: TradeSecurix helps traders and analysts verify counterparties and analyze documents through structured risk reports before making financial decisions.

demo.title: See It In Action

trust.disclaimer: TradeSecurix is an analytics platform. We do NOT hold funds or execute trades.

testimonials.title: What Professionals Say
testimonials.subtitle: Feedback from analysts and traders using TradeSecurix in their workflows.

t1.name: Sarah M.
t1.text: The structured risk reports have helped my team flag potential counterparty issues much earlier in the process. It's become a routine step before any new partnership.

t2.name: Carlos R.
t2.text: We started using TradeSecurix for company verification before engaging new suppliers. The clarity of the reports made the process straightforward.

t3.name: Fatima A.
t3.text: As someone in compliance, having a structured way to document our due diligence steps has been valuable. The platform is clear and professional.

t4.name: Minh T.
t4.text: The document validation feature saved us from a potentially problematic deal. Good tooling for anyone working with international counterparties.
